Detailed Description: Report the current credit score of the borrower using a commercially available credit bureau score. Provide the most recently determined score. Report vendor in item 111 and version in item 112. Required for portfolio loans, optional for serviced-for-others loans. Must be updated at least one month within the quarter.
Allowed Values: Provide as a whole number, e.g.: 723

Detailed Description: Owner Occupancy Flag - Report Occupancy related information available on the mortgage at the time of origination.
Allowed Values: 1 = Primary; 2 = Second Home; 3 = Non Owner / Investment; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Lien Position at Origination - Report the position of this loan relative to any additional liens on the property. If there are no additional liens, the loan is in first position. If the lien position is greater than third, code as "3".
Allowed Values: 1 = First lien; 2 = Second lien; 3 = Third lien or greater; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Report the home equity line type. Home Equity Loan = traditional fixed term second mortgages with no draw feature. Home Equity Line of Credit = borrower may access an available credit line through draw features; balances may have fixed term, locked or amortizing portions.
Allowed Values: 1 = Home Equity Loan; 2 = Home Equity Line of Credit; 3 = Other

Detailed Description: Number of units to the property financed by the loan. If the actual number of units is not available for multi-family or 1-4 family properties, code with "U". For CRE or commercial purpose mortgage loans on multiple properties, code with "Y".
Allowed Values: 1 = one unit; 2 = two units; 3 = three units; 4 = four units; Y = Other; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Property Type - Report the property type. For one property with multiple uses, report as "F" (Mixed Use). For properties with more than one piece of collateral, report as "Z" (Other). If known PUD with known underlying type, report underlying type. If known PUD with unknown underlying type, use 6=PUD.
Allowed Values: 1 = Single Family Resident; 2 = Condo; 3 = Co-Op; 4 = 2-4 Units; 5 = Townhouse; 6 = Planned Unit Development; 7 = 5+Units; E = Commercial; F = Mixed Use; M = Manufactured Housing; Z = Other; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Report the interest type at origination. Fixed = Loans where the interest rate is fixed for the entire term. Variable = Loans where the interest rate fluctuates based on a spread to an index, including all variable rate loans regardless of initial fixed period.
Allowed Values: 1 = Fixed; 2 = Variable

Detailed Description: Interest Only at Origination - Report whether the loan required interest only at origination. An IO mortgage allows the borrower to pay only interest for a specified number of years.
Allowed Values: Y=Yes; N=No; U=Unknown

Detailed Description: Interest Only in Reporting Month - Report whether the minimum payment in the reporting month represents only the interest due on the loan.
Allowed Values: N = Was not I/O in reporting month; Y = Was I/O in reporting month; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Loan Source - Report the source by which the servicer originated or otherwise acquired the loan. At the servicer's discretion, acquired servicing may be reported as retail, broker, or correspondent originations to the extent information is available.
Allowed Values: 1 = Retail (Branch, Internet); 2 = Wholesale; 3 = Correspondent; 4 = Servicing Rights Purchased; 5 = Bulk Purchased; 6 = Wealth Management / Private Banking; U = Unknown

Detailed Description: Credit Class - Report the credit class designation as Prime, Alt-A, Non-prime, or Government Owned as assessed at the time of loan origination; it shall not change over time.
Allowed Values: 1 = Prime; 2 = Alt-A; 3 = Non-prime; 4 = Government Owned

Detailed Description: Loan / Line Owner - Report the investor of the loan. Securitized = loans securitized by private or public issuers. Portfolio = loans owned and held on the bank's balance sheet (including HFS and HFI). Serviced For Others = loans not in securitizations and owned by another party.
Allowed Values: 1 = Securitized; 2 = Portfolio; 3 = Serviced For Others; 4 = Other

Detailed Description: ARM initial rate adjustment period (In months) - Report the term from origination to the first interest rate change date for ARMs. Report the initial fixed P&I payment period in months for adjustable rate hybrid loans.
Allowed Values: Whole Number

Detailed Description: Report the payment reset frequency for adjustable rate loans in months. Example: annual adjustment = 12 months; floating rate note resetting monthly = 1.
Allowed Values: Whole Number

Detailed Description: Draw Period - For lines of credit only, report the duration in months (starting with origination date) during which the borrower can make withdrawals. Leave blank for home equity loans. Use 999 for "evergreen" accounts.

Report the published financial index name used to determine the interest rate. All ARM interest rate and payment variables should be populated with origination values. If using WSJ prime rate, use code '50'. For HELOCs, use items 29-36 for caps, floors, margins, and rate indexes.
Allowed Values: 07=COSI; 10=Tbill Unknown Type; 11=Tbill 3mo; 12=Tbill 6mo; 13=Tbill 1yr; 14=Tbill 3yr; 15=Tbill 5yr; 1Z=Tbill Other; 20=COFI Unknown Type; 21=COFI 11D; 22=COFI NM; 2Z=COFI Other; 30=LIBOR Unknown Type; 31=LIBOR 3mo; 32=LIBOR 6mo; 33=LIBOR 1yr; 3Z=LIBOR other; 40=FHLBB Ntl Mtg Rt; 50=Bank Prime Rate; 60=Certificate of Deposit; 70=FNMA/FHLMC; 80=MTA; 81=LAMA; 91=SOFR 1mo; 92=SOFR 3mo; 93=SOFR 6mo; 94=SOFR 1yr; 99=SOFR Unknown Type; 9Z=SOFR Other; ZZ=Other; UU=Unknown; B1=BSBY 1mo; B2=BSBY 3mo; B3=BSBY 6mo; B4=BSBY 1yr; B5=BSBY Unknown Type; BZ=BSBY Other

Detailed Description: ARM margin - Report the margin for adjustable rate loans, which is the rate added to the index to determine the monthly interest rate at origination.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0575 for 5.75%

Detailed Description: ARM Periodic Rate Cap - Report the periodic interest rate cap for adjustable rate loans. Absolute rate cap (not spread from original). Populate with origination values.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0175 for 1.75%

Detailed Description: ARM Periodic Rate Floor - Report the periodic interest rate floor for adjustable rate loans. Absolute rate floor (not spread from original). Populate with origination values.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0175 for 1.75%

Detailed Description: ARM Lifetime Rate Cap - Report the lifetime interest rate for adjustable rate mortgages. Absolute rate cap (not spread from original). Populate with origination values.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0575 for 5.75%

Detailed Description: ARM Lifetime Rate Floor - Report the minimum lifetime interest rate for adjustable rate mortgages. Absolute rate floor (not spread from original). Populate with origination values.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0575 for 5.75%

Detailed Description: Retired March 2020
Retired March 2020

Report the term in months on the original loan/line. For both home equity loans and lines of credit. For a line of credit, the term should be combined draw period and amortized repayment period. For commercial system demand accounts, leave blank. Do not change for modifications. Use '999' for evergreen loans.
Allowed Values: Whole Number. Allowable values: 0 - 600, 999

Detailed Description: Bankruptcy flag - Report whether the borrower is in bankruptcy as of the end of the reporting month. Flag all loans where the servicer has been notified of the borrowers' bankruptcy declaration. Include co-borrowers.
Allowed Values: N = Not in bankruptcy in reporting month; Y = In bankruptcy in reporting month

Detailed Description: Next payment due date - Report the due date for the next outstanding payment on the loan. For delinquent loans, this date will be in the past. Leave blank for accounts closed in current month. For Chapter 13 bankruptcy, report contractual due date.
Allowed Values: YYYYMMDD

Detailed Description: Original Interest Rate - Report the annual percentage rate as specified on the note at the time of origination.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0575 for 5.75%

Detailed Description: Current Interest Rate - Report the annual percentage rate of the loan as of the last day of the reporting month.
Allowed Values: Provide as a fraction. E.g.: 0.0575 for 5.75%

Detailed Description: Interest Type in Current Month - Report the interest type in the reporting month.
Allowed Values: 1 = Fixed; 2 = Variable

Detailed Description: Principal and Interest (P&I) Amount Current - Report the scheduled principal and interest due from the borrower in the reporting month. For balloon loans paying off, report the full amount due. A value of 0 is permissible for paying-off loans and REO records. For quarterly-billed mortgages, report zero for off-quarter months. Do not include past due amounts.
Allowed Values: Whole Number e.g., 5123 for $5,122.81. Use banker's rounding.

Detailed Description: Unpaid Principal Balance - Report the current unpaid balance at end of reporting month. Does not include charge-offs, discounts or other accounting marks. For loans: reduce to zero only when liquidated. For lines: reduce to zero when liquidated or credit line not being utilized.
Allowed Values: e.g, 125000 for $125,000.00. Use banker's rounding.

Detailed Description: For home equity line of credit accounts, report the total amount drawn during the month. For lines with a zero balance and no draws, report '0'.
Allowed Values: e.g., 125000 for $125,000.00. Use banker's rounding.
